data_description.api_key: An API key for your Emby server. You can create an API key in the Emby web interface under 'Advanced' > 'API Keys'.
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Emby server.
data_description.port: The port number your Emby server is listening on (leave blank for default).
data_description.ssl: Whether to use SSL to connect to your Emby server (false by default).
